caribbean.headline: Heavy Rainfall Impacts Martinique Amid Light Winds
caribbean.paragraph: Martinique is experiencing heavy rain with 100% rain probability under light southeast winds at 13 kt and wave heights reaching 3.1 ft with a 7-second swell period. St. Lucia is seeing similar conditions with 11 kt winds and less than 10% rain probability.

mediterranean.headline: Heavy Rain and Rough Seas Impact Cadiz Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Cadiz is experiencing strong westerly winds sustained at 22 kt with wave heights reaching 7.8 ft and a 14-second dominant swell period from the WSW. The port is under a 100% rain probability, signaling persistent heavy rainfall, while Lisbon sees lighter conditions with winds at 14 kt and less than 10% rain probability.
